recent_excerpts: A new malware family named ZionSiphon is designed to sabotage water treatment and desalination plants by manipulating industrial control systems.

Siemens, Schneider Electric, and six other major industrial control system vendors released security advisories addressing dozens of vulnerabilities, including critical flaws in Siemens SIMATIC and Sc
Operational Technology asset owners face regulatory pressure to attest to post-quantum cryptographic readiness but lack the necessary discovery and inventory tools, leading to superficial compliance.
